def write_report(path, rows):
    lines = []
    for row in rows:
        lines.append(f"{row['id']},{row['name']},{row['score']}")
    with open(path, "w") as f:
        f.write("\n".join(lines) + "\n")


def build_csv_string(records):
    lines = []
    for rec in records:
        lines.append(f"{rec['id']},{rec['name']},{rec['value']}")
    return "\n".join(lines) + "\n"
